name: performance_review_08

input.subject: Your Annual Performance Review - Scheduled
input.snippet: Hi, I've scheduled your annual performance review...
input.body_text:
Hi,

I've scheduled your annual performance review. Please see the details below:

PERFORMANCE REVIEW MEETING

Date: Thursday, March 5, 2026
Time: 3:00 PM - 4:00 PM
Location: My Office (Room 512)

This is your annual review covering the period from March 2025 to February 2026.

BEFORE THE MEETING:
- Complete your self-assessment in Workday by March 1st
- Reflect on your key accomplishments
- Think about areas for growth and development
- Prepare questions about career progression

DURING THE MEETING:
- We'll discuss your performance and contributions
- Review your goals and set new ones
- Talk about development opportunities
- Discuss compensation (if applicable)

Please let me know if you have any conflicts with this time.

Best,
Robert

--
Robert Chen
Engineering Director

events.title: Annual Performance Review with Robert Chen

notes: Performance review meeting with preparation instructions
